name: Silver Wire
short_description: Zombies and bats have appeared in the night hall. It is also the maid's job to eliminate them. Her weapon, the silver wire, binds and cuts the monsters. Let's get down to work.
detailed_description:
"Silver Wire" is an action game where you can enjoy defeating enemies with wires.
The purpose of this game is to kill as many enemies as possible.

Player Actions:
- Bind and cut monsters.

Stages:
- 1. Night Hall (zombie, bat)
- 2. Butterfly cage (zombie, butterfly)
- 3. Jellyfish Aquarium (zombie, jellyfish)
- 4. Knight Hall (zombie, knight)

Rules:
- If you touch an enemy, you will be damaged.
- The first damage is prevented by the shield, but the second is game over.
- The shield will heal when you defeat 100 enemies.

You are free to make gameplay videos and stream live.
